text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Misfiled followup, apparently to ports/160190.  I don't have an MSDR for 
utf-8 but I can provide translations of the text. 

This version of Samba now present at Port's tree 
(http://www.freshports.org/net/samba36/), but this SEND-PR don't closed.
